seoTitle: Lyons vs Manbulloo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lyons and Manbulloo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lyons and Manbulloo.
heading: Lyons vs Manbulloo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lyons, Northern Territory and Manbulloo, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lyons has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Manbulloo (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lyons or Manbulloo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lyons has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Manbulloo scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lyons scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Manbulloo scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lyons or Manbulloo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lyons has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
